title: tpm2-rs git dep pinned to exact rev with no stated reason or upgrade path
description: wolftpm-tss/Cargo.toml pins tpm2-rs-client and tpm2-rs-base to rev=a7bf0e9 with no comment explaining why that specific commit was chosen or what tracking mechanism exists to notice upstream breaking changes. tpm-rs is not on crates.io. When that rev becomes incompatible (e.g. Connection trait changes) the failure will be silent until someone runs a build. Maintenance consequence: surprise breakage on upstream changes with no documented protocol for updating the pin.
